instructions.overview: Translate all 'text' field values from English to French (France market, professional SaaS tone)
rules: Keep all other fields (id, file, type, element, etc.) UNCHANGED
Use professional business French suitable for SaaS platform
Keep technical terms like 'NPS', 'API', 'VOÏA' unchanged unless noted

email_templates.context: Email subject line for survey invitations

email_templates.text: {business_account_name} sollicite votre précieux retour d'expérience via notre système Voice of Client.
email_templates.original_text: {business_account_name} is requesting your valuable feedback through our Voice of Client system.

email_templates.text:
Votre retour d'information contribue à améliorer les services et les expériences. L'enquête ne vous prendra que quelques minutes.

Merci pour votre temps et vos précieuses informations !
email_templates.original_text:
Your feedback helps improve services and experiences. The survey should take just a few minutes to complete.

Thank you for your time and valuable insights!

email_templates.text: Ceci est un message automatique. Si vous avez des questions, veuillez contacter l'organisation qui vous a envoyé cette enquête.
email_templates.original_text: This is an automated message. If you have any questions, please contact the organization that sent this survey.

email_templates.text: Rappel : votre avis est toujours attendu - {campaign_name}
email_templates.original_text: Reminder: Your feedback is still needed - {campaign_name}

email_templates.text: Ceci est un rappel amical indiquant que {business_account_name} attend toujours votre retour d'expérience.
email_templates.original_text: This is a friendly reminder that {business_account_name} is still looking forward to your feedback.
